conventions.layout: src/freelancer_app/<component_snake>/*.py; one package per component (C1 data_store, C2 identity_auth, C3 project_management, C4 time_logging, C5 invoice_export, C6 web_ingress)
conventions.lint: pyproject.toml [tool.pytest.ini_options] pythonpath=['src']; setuptools build; no ruff/black config present
conventions.naming: module dir = snake_case(component.name); module files snake_case (e.g. session_gate.py, oauth_callback.py, project_store.py, identity_record_store.py); pkg = freelancer-app

note: Baseline = greenfield-built, demo-accepted project (S1 sign-in + S4 projects accepted; C1/C2/C3/C6 built). CR-001 extends the project record (C3) at the C1 persistence seam (CT2). New feature IDs continue strictly above the high-water marks; baseline frozen artifacts are immutable (BF1).
